title: Getting Started
description: Learn how to get started with Prizmux

body.raw:
# Getting Started with Prizmux

Welcome to Prizmux! This guide will help you get started.

## Installation

```bash
npm install prizmux
```

## Basic Usage

Here's how to use the component:

```tsx
import { Component } from 'prizmux'

export default function App() {
  return <Component />
}
```

That's it! You're ready to go.
